transcript_facts:
- [Findings] so i was reading about this syndrome that i actually have never heard of .
- [Findings] she does have a gi doctor , because she has reflex really bad .
- [Findings] it sounds like we're looking for continual- congenital anomalies wi- of the kidney and urinary tract .
- [Findings] so the only way to know that , is to do a kidney ultrasound .
- [Findings] let me put that into the system , and then downstairs they can do the ultrasound .
- [Findings] so let's get your ultrasound done , and we'll see how it goes .
- [Findings] so , let's complete the ultrasound today . if it's normal , you wo n't need to see me again , but if it's abnormal , you can see me in kennesaw .
- [Findings] the nurse will be in to have you complete some paperwork , and give you instructions for the ultrasound .
- [Findings] physical exams show the well-nourished female , who is slightly fussy when examined .
- [Findings] several organ systems can be affected by this chromosomal deletion syndrome . congenital anomalies of the kidney and urinary tract have been reported in the literature . we will obtain the screening of the kidneys by ultrasound today . if there are abnormalities on the kidney ultrasound , we will determine next steps and future follow-up .
- [History of Present Illness] he also has autism .
- [History of Present Illness] she just had problems with eating , where she would stop breathing when she was eating . like preemie type stuff ?
- [History of Present Illness] and then she has seen an allergist , and also a neurologist ... who diagnosed her with this syndrome , because she still does n't walk and she was n't sitting by herself a year old .
- [History of Present Illness] is she in therapy ? she is in therapy . she's in feeding therapy , occupational therapy , and also physical therapy .
- [History of Present Illness] so , she has a lot of therapies .
- [History of Present Illness] when we saw the geneticist , she told us that sometimes people with this syndrome , they have trouble with their kidneys . she also said sometimes they have problems with their legs , so that was why we saw ortho .
- [History of Present Illness] she's running around , and she does n't have any problems .
- [History of Present Illness] she's just sh- a little shorter and chunkier , but i think that's a part of her syndrome . yeah , i was reading all the things associated with the syndrome .
- [History of Present Illness] she has mild hypotonia of the lower extremities in her arms .
- [History of Present Illness] katherine is a 22-month-old former 34 and 3-week-old , twin with smith magenis syndrome .
- [Plan] anybody in the family with kidney failure , dialysis or transplant ?
